## What's Changed
* feat: automerge klaus image updates and receive release dispatch by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-toolchains/pull/5
* feat: notify personality repos on toolchain release via repository_dispatch by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-toolchains/pull/6
